Hero.subtitle: Professional Scuba Diving Education & Tours
Hero.description: Safe and exciting diving experiences with GoDiveKor

Courses.sectionDescription: Step-by-step scuba diving programs from beginner to expert

open-water.title: Open Water Diver Course
open-water.subtitle: SDI Open Water Diver
open-water.heading: 🤿 Your First Step into Scuba Diving, Where You First Meet the Ocean
open-water.desc1:
A new world awaits you beneath the waves.
This course certifies you to dive safely to a depth of 18m.
open-water.desc2:
From theory to pool training, and finally the real ocean
With confidence building at every step, you'll become a proud diver before you know it. 🌊
open-water.excluded1: Pool entry fee, tank & equipment rental
open-water.excluded2: Ocean training costs (overseas approx. $150/day, min. 2 days)

advanced.title: Advanced Open Water Course
advanced.subtitle: SDI Advanced Open Water Diver
advanced.description: The next level after Open Water! Dive up to 30 meters and experience 5 adventure dives including deep diving, underwater navigation, and night diving. Get ready to explore the wider ocean.

rescue.title: Rescue Diver Course
rescue.subtitle: SDI Rescue Diver
rescue.description: Learn to handle emergency situations during diving. From self-rescue to assisting other divers and emergency management, this course will help you become a true diver.

fun-dive.title: Discover Scuba Diving
fun-dive.subtitle: Discover Scuba Diving
fun-dive.description: Experience the underwater world without certification! A professional instructor accompanies you 1:1 for a safe and guided underwater adventure. Perfect for first-time divers.

Schedule.sectionDescription: Check our education and tour schedules
Schedule.noEvents: No events scheduled for this month

Footer.companyDescription: Professional scuba diving education and tours.
Footer.companyPromise: We promise safe and exciting diving experiences.

Logbook.name: Name
Logbook.successMessage: Your dive log has been saved successfully.

cebu.name: Cebu
cebu.description: Whale shark snorkeling, sardine tornado, crystal-clear emerald waters

moalboal.name: Moalboal
moalboal.description: Millions of sardines in a tornado, sea turtles, beach entry diving

dumaguete.name: Dumaguete
dumaguete.description: Apo Island marine sanctuary, rich coral reefs and diverse marine life

sabang.name: Sabang
sabang.description: Dive point near Manila, famous for night diving

coron.name: Coron
coron.description: WWII wreck diving mecca, explore Japanese warship remains

malapascua.name: Malapascua
malapascua.description: One of the few places to see thresher sharks in the world

miyakejima.name: Miyakejima
miyakejima.description: Dive with dolphins, explore dynamic volcanic terrain

mikomoto.name: Mikomoto
mikomoto.description: Hammerhead shark point, thrilling strong current diving

okinawa.name: Okinawa
okinawa.description: Manta rays, crystal visibility, the beautiful Kerama Blue

jeju.name: Jeju Island
jeju.description: Soft coral colonies, haenyeo culture, year-round diving

ulleungdo.name: Ulleungdo
ulleungdo.description: Clear visibility, unique volcanic island terrain, large marine colonies

komodo.name: Komodo
komodo.description: Manta rays, strong currents, land of the Komodo dragon

bali.name: Bali
bali.description: Manta Point, Nusa Penida mola mola, USS Liberty wreck

palau.name: Palau
palau.description: Blue Corner, German Channel, Jellyfish Lake. One of the world's top 7 dive sites

sipadan.name: Sipadan
sipadan.description: Barracuda tornado, turtle paradise, world top 10 dive point

cancun.name: Cancun
cancun.description: Cenote cave diving, underwater museum, bull shark diving
